question: 结合制度和业务数据，核查以R004212为线索的拆分报销异常，返回发现ID和record_id集合，并说明日期窗口、合计金额和制度依据。

audit_period.basis: 7-day window around R004212 expense_date 2025-04-10 per Article 11

scope.rule: Article 11 of 2025 Reimbursement Policy - Split Reimbursement

policy_questions.question: Does Article 11 of the 2025 Reimbursement Policy apply to these records?
policy_questions.clause: Article 11: 同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销，且合计金额达到《授权管理办法》附件二较高审批线的，应重点核查拆分规避审批。

policy_questions.question: What is the applicable approval tier for the individual records and their combined total?
Does the travel lodging standard support the finding of split reimbursement?
policy_questions.clause: Article 4: 经理级/一类城市: 650元/晚 standard

data_questions.question: What are the details of R004212 and all records for E0009 with travel_lodging within the 7-day window?

evidence_requirements: Combined amount calculation and approval tier comparison

execution_steps.action: Retrieve policy texts and record details

complexity_reasons: Single rule (Article 11) but requires aggregation of amounts across records
Policy-data cross-referencing for travel standard compliance

subagent_plan.reason: Only 2 records in scope; straightforward aggregation and policy comparison; compact mode is sufficient

stopping_conditions: All records for E0009 travel_lodging in 7-day window identified
Combined amount calculated and compared to approval tiers
Policy basis for split determination confirmed
